title: Avi - The Helpful Jungle Guardian and the Forest of Smiles

global_settings.color_palette: Soft pastel (lush greens, warm yellows, soft blues)
global_settings.lighting: Warm cinematic lighting with gentle glow

pages.title: PAGE 1
lines: Avi stepped into a quiet jungle, soft and green.
Why does everything feel a little sad?

pages.title: PAGE 2
lines: A little monkey sat alone on a branch.
My bananas are gone and I feel so hungry.

pages.title: PAGE 3
lines: Avi searched gently through leaves and trees.
Don’t worry, I will help you find them.

pages.title: PAGE 4
lines: The monkey hugged Avi with a big smile.
Thank you! You made me happy again.

pages.title: PAGE 5
lines: A big elephant stood near the river.
My feet hurt and I cannot walk properly.

pages.title: PAGE 6
lines: Avi washed her feet with cool water.
I am here to help you feel better.

pages.title: PAGE 7
lines: The elephant lifted her trunk happily.
You helped me feel strong again!

pages.title: PAGE 8
lines: A small bird looked at her fallen nest.
My home is gone, I feel so sad.

pages.title: PAGE 9
lines: Avi carefully placed the nest back.
Your home is safe again.

pages.title: PAGE 10
lines: The bird sang happily again.
You brought my smile back!

pages.title: PAGE 11
lines: A big tree stood quiet and dull.
No one smiles anymore.

pages.title: PAGE 12
lines: Avi gently touched the tree.
Let us bring smiles back together.

pages.title: PAGE 13
lines: The tree glowed with bright leaves.
I feel alive again!

pages.title: PAGE 14
lines: Avi called all his friends together.
Let us all smile together.

pages.title: PAGE 15
lines: Animals laughed and danced happily.
The jungle felt warm again.

pages.title: PAGE 16
lines: The jungle glowed with happiness.
Avi stood with smiling friends.
Kindness made the forest shine.
